_comment: Object catalog. 'name' is the JSON key. Schema: { layer:int8, color:[r,g,b,a]|hex, sprite?:'path/under/assets', tags?:[strings], radius?:uint8 }. Color is the procedural-fallback fill when sprite is missing or fails to load. Layers: bg=-1, floor=0, item=1, push=2, player=3, fx=4.

secret_wall._comment: Test target for toggle swap. Stepping onto a toggle within radius flips this in/out of Hidden.

player._comment: Generic player. Auto-transformed at runtime to one of the per-region player_N sprites by the PatchPlayerSprite system.

convey_e._comment: Region 5 conveyor — pushes anything standing on it east one cell per tick.

link_a._comment: Region 6 cluster member, group A. All entities with this name share one Linked head and move together when any one is pushed.
